items.claim: Max Holloway is not physically capable of competing with top-15 welterweights.
items.quote: he's not going to be able to compete with the 170ers who are you know at the top like even in the top 15 of that division

items.claim: Max Holloway's fighting style is characterized by a slow, consistent pressure that wears opponents down.
items.quote: Max has been Max is Max is a jackhammer in slow motion. Like he's just constantly chipping.

items.claim: Mauricio Ruffy has previous experience successfully competing against a larger opponent who missed weight.
items.quote: Huffy had a little experience, I guess, in having to face a guy who was bigger than him and he persevered in that fight just fine.

items.claim: Mauricio Ruffy has more experience competing at welterweight than Max Holloway.
items.quote: he's actually had more experience than say Max, you know, who hasn't really fought there.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is currently facing significant negative public sentiment in Ireland.
items.quote: it's like, dude, the the Irish hate him now.

items.claim: Max Holloway's ability to wait for an opening and score a finish is his primary tactical calling card.
items.quote: on the right night Max's ability to just kind of wait, wait, wait, go and then score a huge win. Um it's so it's sort of his calling card to a degree.
